name: Before/After Transformation
description: Split-screen transformation showing pet hair removal
environment_block: cozy modern apartment living room with soft daylight through windows, light gray couch visibly covered in golden retriever pet hair, realistic home clutter, warm neutral tones
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld selfie framing, natural hand movement, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic phone exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator shows dirty couch, then slowly drags FurLift across surface in satisfying motion, pauses to show collected hair and clean result, dramatic before/after comparison
performance_block: enthusiastic reaction, genuine excitement, direct eye contact with camera, impressed expression showing the transformation
platform_block: realistic TikTok UGC ad style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, fast social-media pacing with dramatic reveal
lighting_block: natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic indoor lighting, slight smartphone overexposure near windows
motion_block: slow handheld motion, natural body shifting, realistic wrist movement while filming selfie-style, smooth but imperfect movement, dramatic reveal motion
audio_block: subtle room ambience, fabric brushing sounds, satisfying collection sounds, excited creator speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no beauty-filter look, no luxury influencer aesthetic
